- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created. (Created file per setup instructions.)

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements (User specified Chrome extension manifest v3 with new tab override requirements.)

- [x] Scaffold the Project (Initialized manifest, HTML, CSS, JS, and assets per specified structure.)

- [x] Customize the Project (Implemented modular JS, UI styling, storage hooks, and background assets per requirements.)

- [x] Install Required Extensions (No extensions specified in setup guidance.)

- [x] Compile the Project (Static Chrome extension assets—no build step required; linting not applicable.)

- [x] Create and Run Task (No automated tasks required for static assets.)

- [x] Launch the Project (Provided chrome://extensions load-unpacked guidance; awaiting user launch in Chrome.)
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete (README.md and instructions updated; removed guidance comments.)

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
